title: get dashboard analytics data with valid token
description: Test the GET /api/v1/dashboard/analytics endpoint with a valid access token to verify it returns 200 status and correct AnalyticsData response.

title: get widget configurations with valid token
description: Test the GET /api/v1/dashboard/widgets endpoint with a valid access token to verify it returns 200 status and an array of WidgetConfig objects.

title: list all customers with valid token
description: Test the GET /api/v1/customers endpoint with a valid access token to verify it returns 200 status and a list of Customer objects.

title: create new customer with valid data
description: Test the POST /api/v1/customers endpoint with valid customer data and a valid access token to verify it returns 200 status and the created Customer object.

title: update existing customer with valid data
description: Test the PUT /api/v1/customers/{id} endpoint with a valid customer ID, valid update data, and a valid access token to verify it returns 200 status and the updated Customer object.

title: list all products with valid token
description: Test the GET /api/v1/products endpoint with a valid access token to verify it returns 200 status and a list of Product objects.

title: create new product with valid data
description: Test the POST /api/v1/products endpoint with valid product data and a valid access token to verify it returns 200 status and the created Product object.

title: user login with valid credentials
description: Test the POST /api/v1/public/auth/login endpoint with valid username and password to verify it returns 200 status and LoginResponse with access and refresh tokens.

title: refresh access token with valid refresh token
description: Test the POST /api/v1/auth/refresh endpoint with a valid refresh token to verify it returns 200 status and a new access token.

title: get analytics summary with valid token
description: Test the GET /api/v1/analytics/summary endpoint with a valid access token to verify it returns 200 status and AnalyticsSummary data.
